# agentops_grant (Resource)

An authorization grant: binds a subject to a capability or role over a resource.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "agentops_grant" "sre_deployer" {
  grant_kind    = "role"
  role_id       = agentops_role.deployer.id
  resource_type = "agent"
  resource_id   = "*"

  subject = jsonencode({
    id   = "prn_01hxyz"
    kind = "principal"
  })
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `grant_kind` (String) Kind of grant, one of "capability" or "role".
- `resource_id` (String) Identifier of the resource the grant applies to.
- `resource_type` (String) Type of the resource the grant applies to.
- `subject` (String) Subject the grant is bound to, encoded as JSON (id and kind).

### Optional

- `capability` (String) Capability granted (when grant_kind is "capability").
- `description` (String) Free-form grant description.
- `expires_at` (String) Optional expiry timestamp for the grant.
- `policy_id` (String) Policy the grant references (when applicable).
- `role_id` (String) Role granted (when grant_kind is "role").
- `selector` (String) Optional attribute selector, encoded as JSON.

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String) Timestamp the grant was created (server-derived).
- `id` (String) Grant identifier.
